name: Company Best Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover whole cucumbers with boiling water. Allow to stand until the next morning.
2. Drain the cucumbers and repeat this procedure for the next 3 mornings.
3. On the fifth day, drain and slice the cucumbers into half-inch pieces.
4. Combine sugar, spice, salt, and vinegar in a pot. Bring to a boil.
5. Pour the mixture over the cucumbers and let stand for 2 days.
6. On the third day, bring the mixture to a boil again and seal in hot jars.
